nasb.text: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted, But by the mouth of the wicked it is torn down.

esv.text: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted, but by the mouth of the wicked it is overthrown.

cnv.text: 因正直人的祝福，城的地位就提高； 因惡人的口，城就傾覆。

ccb.text: 城因正直人的祝福而兴盛， 因恶人的口舌而倾覆。

csbs.text: 因正直人的祝福，城就被高举； 因恶人的口，城就被倾覆。
